projects.title: AI-Powered Health Monitoring System for Indian Navy
projects.description: Led the development of a smart AI-driven health tracking and advisory system for Indian Navy employees, integrating intelligent medical insights, interactive dashboards, and real-time assistance.
keyFeatures: Interactive Dashboard: Role-based access for Admin, Doctors, and Employees
AI-Powered Health Analysis: Users upload medical records; an AI agent analyzes reports and provides insights on causes, precautions, and diet
Knowledge-Driven AI Agent: Built on medical literature and multiple sources for accurate recommendations
AI Chatbot: Employees can discuss health concerns and receive real-time assistance
FastAPI Backend: Supports multi-user sessions for seamless access
Docker Deployment: Secured for local use on a private network Modern
UI with React: Built an engaging and responsive fronten with seprate role based login and UI

projects.title: AI-Powered Material Certificate Validation System for Circor
projects.description: Developed a robust AI-driven system for Circor to automate the extraction and validation of material certificate data. The platform intelligently processes complex PDFs, identifies and structures multiple embedded tables across pages, and validates extracted chemical, mechanical, and heat treatment properties against predefined industrial standards.
keyFeatures: AI-Driven Table Detection & Structure Recognition: Leveraged Vision-Language Models (VLMs) and image processing techniques to detect and extract multiple tables from unstructured PDFs across pages, organizing them into structured formats (chemical, mechanical, heat treatment) with 92% accuracy
Standard-Based Validation: Validates all extracted properties against fixed material standards to ensure compliance and integrity
FastAPI Backend: Provides a secure, session-based interface to handle file uploads, validation workflows, and data retrieval
MongoDB Storage: Stores raw and validated data with full traceability and audit logging
React Frontend: Built a responsive UI with user authentication, interactive dashboards, and a searchable record system
Scalable Pipeline: End-to-end processing architecture enabling continuous ingestion and intelligent parsing of new certificates

projects.title: AI Chat Assistant for HR & Document Queries – MDL (Mazagon Dockyard Ltd.)
projects.description: Designed and deployed an AI-powered conversational assistant for MDL to automate and streamline internal HR and passport/documentation queries. The system combines Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with real-time database access, achieving high accuracy in query resolution while significantly reducing manual overhead.
keyFeatures: AI Agent with RAG Pipeline: Implemented a Retrieval-Augmented Generation system achieving 91% accuracy on HR and documentation query resolution
Multi-Source Query Handling: Seamlessly integrates MySQL for structured internal data and real-time web sources for unstructured queries
Document Pipeline: Supports 10+ file formats (PDF, Word, Excel, etc.) with preprocessing and vector indexing using LanceDB
LLM on Runpod: Reduced inference cost by 65% using serverless deployment of large language models via Runpod
LangGraph Orchestration: Managed multi-turn conversations and session memory using LangGraph for improved context retention
FastAPI Backend: Secure, session-based API layer for handling chat, search, and file ingestion workflows
React Frontend: Built a clean and responsive chat UI with login, history tracking, and real-time feedback
Full Deployment Stack: Hosted backend and frontend on Hostinger with Nginx reverse proxy, ensuring 99.9% uptime in production

projects.title: Intelligent News & Defense Data Extraction Agent
projects.description: A robust system for extracting and structuring unstructured data from Pakistani news and defense sources, enabling efficient query-based retrieval and insightful analysis through an intelligent agent.
keyFeatures: Web Scraping: Implemented Crawl4AI to scrape and collect data from multiple Pakistani news and defense websites, storing structured metadata in a MySQL database
Data Processing: Applied text preprocessing, cleaning, and normalization to extract meaningful insights
Vector Database: Created embeddings and stored them in a Milvus vector database for efficient similarity search
RAG Pipeline: Built an Agentic RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipeline with reranking and ensemble retrieval for high-accuracy responses
Deployment: Backend powered by FastAPI, frontend developed with JavaScript, HTML, and CSS

projects.title: Real-Time Road Scenario Object Detection
projects.description: A computer vision system for real-time detection of multiple road-related objects, including traffic signs, boards, speed breakers, and more. Trained and fine-tuned a YOLOv8 model on a custom dataset for high-accuracy predictions.
keyFeatures: Implemented YOLOv8 with custom training on a self-collected dataset
Annotated data in COCO format and converted to YOLO for training
Achieved 89% mAP on the fine-tuned model
Deployed using FastAPI for backend processing
Built an interactive Streamlit application for real-time detection via video, image, and camera input
Designed for efficient real-time inference on various deployment platforms

projects.title: AI-Powered Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: A sophisticated analytics platform that leverages machine learning for data visualization and predictive analytics. Features include customizable dashboards, automated report generation, and trend analysis.
keyFeatures: Integrated machine learning models for prediction
Built interactive data visualizations
Implemented real-time data processing
Optimized performance for large datasets
